characters.name: Amanda Wagner
characters.description: Amanda WagnerAliasesMandy(to Evelyn Mitchell)WagsAffiliationGeorgia Bureau of InvestigationOccupationChief of the Georgia Bureau of InvestigationBiographical informationDate of birthc. 1965-1966Date of death2026Physical descriptionGenderFemaleAppearancesPortrayed bySonja SohnSydney Park(Young Amanda)Debut"Pilot"Amanda Wagneris a character on the ABC TV seriesWill Trent. She is portrayed bySonja Sohn. Sydney Park(Young Amanda) Amanda Wagner is the chief of theGeorgia Bureau of Investigation. As a young officer, she discovered the boyWill Trentin a dumpster near his mother's dead body. She gave him his name and took care of him for three weeks before surrendering him to foster care. Their next meeting would not come until 19 years later, when Will was unhoused and had been arrested for stealing food. This meeting would ultimately lead to Will becoming one of the Bureau's star detectives.

characters.name: Angie Polaski
characters.description: Angie PolaskiRelativesDelilah “Didi” Polaski(mother)†Seth McDale (husband)AffiliationAtlanta Police DepartmentOccupationHomicide detectiveBiographical informationMarital statusMarriedPhysical descriptionGenderFemaleAppearancesPortrayed byErika ChristensenDebut"Pilot"Angie Polaskiis a character on the ABC TV seriesWill Trent. She is portrayed byErika Christensen. Seth McDale (husband) Angie Polaski is a homicide detective with the Atlanta Police Department. She grew up together withWill Trent, now an ace detective with theGeorgia Bureau of Investigation, in Atlanta's foster care system. The two of them have had an on-and-off romantic relationship.

characters.name: Betty
characters.description: BettyAffiliationWill TrentOccupationPetPhysical descriptionGenderFemaleEye colorBrownAppearancesPortrayed byBluebellDebut"Pilot"Betty, also known by the full nameBetty Maria White Trent, is a character on the ABC TV seriesWill Trent. She is portrayed byBluebell. Betty is the pet chihuahua ofWill Trent. Just prior to Will beginning work with theGeorgia Bureau of Investigation, Will's neighbor died, leaving Betty tied up in the yard. Will surrendered her to a shelter, only to then learn that the shelter was only "mostly no-kill." He then chose to adopt her. The two have a complicated relationship - at first, Will does not even like the dog, but over time becomes deeply fond of her.

characters.name: Crystal
characters.description: CrystalRelativesMotherLenny Broussard(stepfather)†OccupationStudentWaitress at Slaughter HouseBiographical informationDate of birth~ 2007Date of death2024 (~17 Years)Place of deathNight CreekPhysical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleEye colorGreenAppearancesPortrayed byChapel Elizabeth OaksAppears in1;2DebutManhunt Lenny Broussard(stepfather)† Crystalis the daughter ofLenny Broussard's mate. She is approached byAngie Polaskiafter seeing them together at the police station. Lenny later molests her, and when Angie goes to arrest him, Crystal stabs him to death. Angie covers for her and the two meet up later and begin to bond. In theseason twofinale, she is revealed to be the serial killer responsible for the murders of several sex offenders with glasses. She is discovered by Angie who tries to help her, but while running away she hits her head on a rock and, despite Angie's attempts to save her, dies from head trauma.

characters.name: Lenny Broussard
characters.description: Lenny BroussardBiographical informationDate of death2024Physical descriptionSpeciesHumanGenderMale Lenny Broussardwas a pedophile who rapedAngie Polaskiwhen she was a teenager under his tutelage and got her pregnant. During the events of the series, he begins a relationship withCrystal's mother and begins abusing her as well. He is killed by Crystal herself when Angie is arresting him.

characters.name: Lucy Morales
characters.description:
Biography: Born in 1963-1964, San Juan Puerto Rico. Approximate age 22-24 at will's birth. 
Approximation based on the assumed timeline of the show. I could be very wrong, thought someone should create a page for Lucy Morales.

characters.name: Marion Alba
characters.description: Marion AlbaAffiliationAtlanta District Attorney's OfficeOccupationAssistant District AttorneyPhysical descriptionGenderFemaleAppearancesPortrayed byGina RodriguezDebut"I'm a Guest Here"Marion Albais a character on the ABC TV seriesWill Trent. She is portrayed byGina Rodriguez. Marion Alba is a charismatic and confident Assistant District Attorney new to Atlanta. Her first encounter withWill Trentfalls flat, but the two of them must work together to investigate a crime in the world of Atlanta gangs.

characters.name: Michael Ormewood
characters.description: Michael OrmewoodAffiliationAtlanta Police DepartmentOccupationHomicide detectivePhysical descriptionGenderMaleEye colorBlueAppearancesPortrayed byJake McLaughlinDebut"Pilot"Michael Ormewoodis a character on the ABC TV seriesWill Trent. He is portrayed byJake McLaughlin. Michael Ormewood is a homicide detective with the Atlanta Police Department. Much to his chagrin, he often finds himself coming into conflict withWill Trentof theGeorgia Bureau of Investigation, who has a tendency to take over crime scenes and cases. Despite this, he is willing to work together with him to get the job done.
